lines: The FIFA World Cup is in full swing in the U.S. right now, so every soccer fan is tuned in.
The Indiana Fever are 9-7, third in the Eastern Conference after a loss to the Atlanta Dream yesterday.
They’ll host the Phoenix Mercury tomorrow at 8 p.m. ET, with Caitlin Clark averaging about 21 a game.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7-4 to stay at 30-44 on the road.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 21. The FIFA World Cup is in full swing in the U.S. right now, so every soccer fan is tuned in. The Indiana Fever are 9-7, third in the Eastern Conference after a loss to the Atlanta Dream yesterday. They’ll host the Phoenix Mercury tomorrow at 8 p.m. ET, with Caitlin Clark averaging about 21 a game. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7-4 to stay at 30-44 on the road. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
